nasb.text: They passed through the Phrygian and Galatian region, having been forbidden by the Holy Spirit to speak the word in Asia;

esv.text: And they went through the region of Phrygia and Galatia, having been forbidden by the Holy Spirit to speak the word in Asia.

cnv.text: 聖靈既然禁止他們在亞西亞傳道，他們就走遍弗呂家、加拉太地區。

ccb.text: 由于圣灵阻止他们到亚细亚传福音，他们便经过弗吕迦和加拉太地区，

csbs.text: 圣灵既然阻止他们在亚细亚省传讲福音，他们就走遍弗里吉亚和加拉太地区。
